Skill Path: Wild Communion

You have the unmatched ability to commune with animals and spirits.

While developing your skills in Nature you chose to focus specifically on Wild Communion, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.6yPrvbSDaa8glLjn]{Pet}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.dZDmWXzZfIoBJ53Q]{Tame Animal}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.6yPrvbSDaa8glLjn]{Pet}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.dZDmWXzZfIoBJ53Q]{Tame Animal}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7t2VGjVhYNU3MsEm]{Spirit Speaker}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.fvYwsHM9O1twQa5N]{Consult the Spirits}
